name: Reading List
description: Track books you want to read, are reading, and have finished with ratings and notes.
ai_context: This is a React + Vite reading list tracker. Single-file App.jsx contains all logic. Features: add books (title, author, genre), three status columns (Want to Read / Reading / Finished) displayed as a kanban-style board, drag-free — click to move between columns, star rating (1-5) for finished books, notes per book, search/filter by title or author, genre filter pills, stats summary (total books, currently reading, finished count, average rating). 5 sample books pre-loaded. All data persisted in localStorage. CSS custom properties in App.css for theming. The user will likely ask to: add book cover images, connect to Google Books API for auto-fill, add reading progress (page numbers), add yearly reading goals, add tags, export to CSV, add a timeline view, add recommendations, etc.
